title: Arrival Registration
subtitle: Scan or enter the vehicle license plate
description: The system will match the plate against planned orders

exactPlateToday.title: Exact Plate, Today
exactPlateToday.description: Highest confidence candidates for immediate registration.

exactPlateNearby.title: Exact Plate, +/- 7 Days
exactPlateNearby.description: Same plate found on nearby planning dates. Check order details before continuing.

manualOverride.title: Manual Override Candidates
manualOverride.description: No exact plate match is required here. Use only after visual/operator confirmation.

noMatch.plateExactRequired: The plate must exactly match the one registered on the order
